nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 史瓦帝尼
nodes.summary: 史瓦帝尼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括Shelley's francolin、Natal spurfowl、Swainson's spurfowl等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Tychaedon
nodes.summary: Tychaedon（Tychaedon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Forest scrub robin、Brown scrub robin、Bearded scrub robin等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Brown scrub robin

nodes.name: 莫桑比克
nodes.summary: 莫桑比克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联154种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Shelley's francolin、Natal spurfowl等154种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Brown scrub robin
nodes.summary: The brown scrub robin (Tychaedon signata) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Eswatini, Mozambique and, South Africa. Its natural habitat is subtropical dry or moist forests. This species was formerly placed in the genus Cercotrichas. Races There are two accepted races: T. s. signata – South African coastal bush and Afromontane forest Description: Greyish brown plumage T. s. tongensis – coastal plain from northern KZN to southern Mozambique Description: Smaller with shorter bill. Paler brown plumage above and warmer buff plumage below. More conspicuous supercilium and moustache stripe. References External links Brown (scrub) robin - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
